districts.dependency_note: Depends on the Live Network spine (infrastructure, not a district) which itself anchors to Olympus Spire; see Meridian_Master.json generation_pipeline for the intermediate step.

hierarchy.note: off_gradient (Sector 0) is deliberately excluded from radial ordering logic — it does not participate in the trust gradient. See Sector_0.md Sec. 4.1.

relationships.detail: No physical connection. Concealment strategies contrast directly: noise vs. helpfulness.
Shared pre-Council transit substrate; contrastive concealment strategies (neglect vs. noise).
Shared old transit substrate. Sector 0 is what the Undercroft would be if it had died instead of survived.
Opposite ends of both radial and vertical axes. Security doctrine line reused verbatim in concept from Undercroft's Guest List scene.
No physical connection. Deliberate architectural/functional opposite: bespoke vs. standardized, ignored vs. trafficked.
Most monitored space vs. only unmonitored space; no meaningful connection beyond opposition.
Party Level fulfills the social-stealth rehearsal White Zones explicitly set up.
Sub-basement node is a smaller dormant cousin of Sector 0's core. Exhibit case subway map is the literal narrative bridge from Contract 2 to Contract 3.
Same proximity-based reality-manipulation rule connecting VOID hardware to physical space: narrow/old at Metro Archives, broadest/live at the Spire.
relationships.note: Metro_Archives_data.json itself records this relationship as 'thematic_only_not_yet_built' since it was authored before the Spire package existed. That earlier status is a harmless artifact of build order, not a contradiction — it is not edited here, per the immutability of approved packages, but the Spire package's later, fuller characterization is treated as current for this registry.

relationships.detail: Silence vs. voice, cold vs. warm, dead core vs. live core. Sector 0 is what the Spire's server hub used to be before being superseded.
relationships.note: Sector_0_data.json records this as 'thematic_lineage_only_not_yet_built' for the same build-order reason noted above.

adjacency_graph.description: Physical World Partition boundary adjacency only — a much stricter and sparser graph than connectivity below.

isolated_nodes.olympus_spire: No physical World Partition boundary shared with any other approved district. Connects only through unbuilt Inner Ring connective tissue.
isolated_nodes.white_zones: No physical World Partition boundary shared with any other approved district, per the no-direct-connection findings above.

connectivity_graph.description: Player-traversable reachability, broader than physical adjacency — includes both transit networks and unbuilt connective tissue.
connectivity_graph.note: Every pair requiring unbuilt connective tissue is Phase 2 scope. This graph does not imply that tissue is designed yet — only that it is where a route must eventually exist.

generation_priority_note: Priority 2 in the full pipeline is the Live Network spine, an infrastructure step rather than a district — see Meridian_Master.json generation_pipeline.generation_order for the complete six-step sequence including infrastructure.
